events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. The condition is a **datum reference frame (DRF) error** — the part was gauged off the wrong surface, so the datum precedence (and thus Degree of Constraint) used for inspection didn't match what the drawing calls out per ASME Y14.5. That invalidates any orientation/position/profile results tied to that datum, regardless of whether the readings looked "in tolerance." Marked `fail` / `high` risk, with corrective actions to hold closeout, re-verify the datum scheme, re-inspect off the correct surfaces, and check for lot-wide exposure from the same gauge setup.
